title: GodelAI: A C-S-P Framework for Wisdom-Preserving Language Models
description: GodelAI is an open-source small language model framework built on the C-S-P (Compression-State-Propagation) philosophy. v3.0.0 establishes prior art for: (1) Fisher Scaling - solved the Fisher Scale Problem (31.5% forgetting reduction), (2) EWC-DR (Logits Reversal) for dead parameters, (3) 82.8% forgetting reduction on conflict data (43x improvement over Standard EWC), (4) FLYWHEEL Self-Recursive Proof (54.6% identity preservation), (5) Semantic T-Score as novel gradient diversity metric, (6) Conflict dataset (107 items) released on HuggingFace.
notes: Defensive publication for C-S-P framework v3.0.0 (April 2026): Fisher Scaling (31.5% forgetting reduction), EWC-DR (Logits Reversal), 82.8% forgetting reduction on conflict data, FLYWHEEL Self-Recursive Proof (54.6% identity preservation). Developed through multi-model collaboration (Manus AI, Claude Code, Gemini, Grok, Perplexity) orchestrated by Alton Lee under MACP v2.2 Identity protocol. Zenodo DOIs: Framework (10.5281/zenodo.19411545), Whitepaper (10.5281/zenodo.19411548), MACP (10.5281/zenodo.19411550).
